backstory.original: Baldric left his position as a prominent member of his family's mercantile empire to seek his fortunes elsewhere. He's a unique cleric that often confounds other clerics because he refuses to pledge his service or faith to a single deity. He prefers to bargain with any and all of them, depending on the situation, to receive his magic. This has lent him a confidence/cockiness that has landed him in his share of trouble. But now he's with the Fallbacks, and over the course of their adventures, his faith in them has become unshakable.
backstory.display: 巴尔德里克舍弃了他在家族商业帝国中显赫的地位，踏上了另寻机遇的旅途。他是一位独特的牧师，常常令其他牧师感到困惑，因为他拒绝效忠或信仰任何单一的神。他更喜欢根据具体的情况与各路神明交涉以获得神力。这给了他信心或者说是傲气，虽然这也让他惹上过不少麻烦。但现在他成为了“后备队”的一员，在经历过各种冒险之后，他坚定不移地相信他的这群伙伴。

description.original: Baldric attacks the closest enemy, dealing 1 hit.
description.display: 巴尔德里克攻击最近的敌人，造成 1 次打击。

description.original: Baldric prevents Champions from being stunned and he empowers his attacks for a short duration.
description.display: 巴尔德里克在短时间内使勇士们不会被眩晕，并强化他的攻击。

longDescription.original: Baldric's mace ignites with radiant light, preventing Champions from being stunned and empowering his attacks for the duration it is aflame
longDescription.display: 巴尔德里克的大锤被耀眼的光芒点燃，在燃烧期间使勇士们不会被眩晕，并强化他的攻击。

description.desc: Uggie joins the party, starting next to Baldric unless she's already in the formation next to another Fallbacks Champion. Uggie increases the damage of all non-adjacent Champions by $amount%
乌吉加入探险队，并将默认与巴尔德里克相邻，除非她已在阵型中并与另一位“后备队”勇士相邻。乌吉会使所有非相邻的勇士伤害提高 $amount%

Baldric's bargaining partners are Fallbacks Champions and/or Champions with Charisma of 15 or higher. Baldric increases the damage of his bargaining partners by $(amount)% for each bargaining partner in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.^^Baldric's bargaining partners also include: $baldric_bargaining_partners

effect_keys.per_hero_expr: GetStat(`cha`) >= 15 || HasTag(`fallbacks`) || ((GetUpgradeUnlocked(17492) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17497) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17507) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17512) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17517)) && HasTag(`dwarf`)) || ((GetUpgradeUnlocked(17493) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17498) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17503) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17513) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17518)) && HasTag(`gold`)) || ((GetUpgradeUnlocked(17494) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17499) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17504) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17509) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17519)) && has_base_attack_dmg_type_magic) || ((GetUpgradeUnlocked(17495) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17500) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17505) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17510) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17515)) && HasTag(`healing`))

filter_targets.hero_expr: GetStat(`cha`) >= 15 || HasTag(`fallbacks`) || ((GetUpgradeUnlocked(17492) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17497) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17507) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17512) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17517)) && HasTag(`dwarf`)) || ((GetUpgradeUnlocked(17493) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17498) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17503) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17513) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17518)) && HasTag(`gold`)) || ((GetUpgradeUnlocked(17494) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17499) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17504) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17509) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17519)) && has_base_attack_dmg_type_magic) || ((GetUpgradeUnlocked(17495) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17500) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17505) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17510) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17515)) && HasTag(`healing`))

description.desc: 巴尔德里克的交涉伙伴是“后备队”勇士和/或魅力大于等于 15 的勇士。阵型中每有一名巴尔德里克的交涉伙伴，他会使他的交涉伙伴的伤害提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。^^巴尔德里克的交涉伙伴还包括：$baldric_bargaining_partners

effect_keys.per_hero_expr: GetStat(`cha`) >= 15 || HasTag(`fallbacks`) || ((GetUpgradeUnlocked(17492) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17497) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17507) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17512) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17517)) && HasTag(`dwarf`)) || ((GetUpgradeUnlocked(17493) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17498) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17503) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17513) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17518)) && HasTag(`gold`)) || ((GetUpgradeUnlocked(17494) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17499) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17504) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17509) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17519)) && has_base_attack_dmg_type_magic) || ((GetUpgradeUnlocked(17495) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17500) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17505) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17510) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17515)) && HasTag(`healing`))

filter_targets.hero_expr: GetStat(`cha`) >= 15 || HasTag(`fallbacks`) || ((GetUpgradeUnlocked(17492) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17497) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17507) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17512) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17517)) && HasTag(`dwarf`)) || ((GetUpgradeUnlocked(17493) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17498) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17503) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17513) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17518)) && HasTag(`gold`)) || ((GetUpgradeUnlocked(17494) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17499) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17504) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17509) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17519)) && has_base_attack_dmg_type_magic) || ((GetUpgradeUnlocked(17495) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17500) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17505) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17510) || GetUpgradeUnlocked(17515)) && HasTag(`healing`))

tipText.original: Baldric increases the damage of his bargaining partners, which start as Fallbacks Champions and those with a high Charisma. More can be added with his specialization choices!
tipText.display: 巴尔德里克会提高他交涉伙伴的伤害，他的交涉伙伴包括初始为“后备队”成员的勇士和有着高魅力值的勇士。你可通过他的专精选项来让更多的勇士加入其中！

description.desc: Baldric's mace ignites with radiant golden light with a duration of $duration seconds. When triggered, Baldric clears any existing stuns on Champions. For the duration, Champions are immune to stuns and Baldric's attacks deal ultimate damage.
巴尔德里克的大锤被耀眼的金光点燃，持续 $duration 秒。此效果触发时，巴尔德里克会消除勇士们的眩晕状态。在效果持续期间，勇士们会免疫眩晕，并且巴尔德里克的攻击会造成杀招伤害。
Uggie's buff is increased by $amount% when Baldric is in the formation.
当巴尔德里克在阵型中时，乌吉的增益提高 $amount%。
Baldric heals the Champions in all the columns in front of him for $amount health per second.
巴尔德里克会使处于他身前各列的勇士每秒恢复 $amount 点生命值。

tipText.original: Baldric heals Champions in all the columns in front of him, and his Healing Lantern empowers all healing abilities when any Champions are heavily damaged.
tipText.display: 巴尔德里克会治疗处于他身前各列的勇士，并且当有任何勇士受重伤时，他的“治疗提灯”会强化所有治疗技能。

description.desc: Baldric increases the pre-stack bonus of Bargaining Power by $(not_buffed amount)%.
巴尔德里克使“交涉之力”叠加前的加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Baldric has a complicated relationship with Tyr, the god of law and justice.
specializationDescription.display: 巴尔德里克与法律与正义之神提尔有着复杂的关系。

description.desc: You may use any Dwarf Champion in the current adventure, even if the Patron, Variant, or other restrictions would say otherwise. Additionally, Dwarf Champions also count as Baldric's bargaining partners.
即使赞助者、支线任务或其他限制条件不允许，你仍可以在当前的冒险中使用一切矮人勇士。此外，矮人勇士也算作巴尔德里克的交涉伙伴。

specializationDescription.original: All dwarves are familiar with the strength of Moradin, the main deity of their pantheon.
specializationDescription.display: 所有矮人都熟知他们万神殿的主神摩拉丁的力量。

description.desc: Baldric gains the Gold Find role and increases the party's gold find by 100% for each bargaining partner, stacking multiplicatively. Additionally, Champions with the Gold Find role also count as Baldric's bargaining partners.
巴尔德里克获得金币寻获角色定位，并且阵型中每有一位交涉伙伴，他会使探险队的金币寻获量提高 100%，以乘算方式堆叠。此外，拥有金币寻获角色定位的勇士也算作巴尔德里克的交涉伙伴。

specializationDescription.original: Baldric bargains with Lady Luck herself when fortune and wealth are required.
specializationDescription.display: 当巴尔德里克需要运气和财富时，他会与幸运女神交涉。

description.desc: Baldric's base attack also deals 5 seconds of BUD-based damage and counts as a magic attack. Additionally, Champions with a magic base attack also count as Baldric's bargaining partners.
巴尔德里克的基本攻击也会造成等同于 5 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害，并算作魔法攻击。此外，以魔法为基本攻击的勇士也算作巴尔德里克的交涉伙伴。

specializationDescription.original: Baldric pleads with the Lady of Mysteries when in need of magic and knowledge.
specializationDescription.display: 当巴尔德里克需要魔法和知识时，他会去乞求神秘女神。

description.desc: Baldric increases the effect of Healing Word by $(not_buffed amount)%. Additionally, Champions with the Healing role also count as Baldric's bargaining partners.
巴尔德里克使“治愈真言”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%。此外，拥有治疗角色定位的勇士也算作巴尔德里克的交涉伙伴。

specializationDescription.original: When violence is not the answer, Baldric turns to Eldath, the Guardian of Groves.
specializationDescription.display: 当暴力无法解决问题时，巴尔德里克会去向树林守护神艾达丝求助。

description.desc: When Uggie is with Baldric, any Champion that is being targeted by Baldric's Healing Word can't take more than $(amount___2)% of their max health in one hit.
当乌吉在巴尔德里克身边时，所有作为巴尔德里克“治愈真言”目标的勇士单次受到的伤害不会超过其最大生命值的 $(amount___2)%。

When any Champion drops to or below $health_percent% of their maximum health, Baldric lights his lantern for the rest of the current area and all healing received by Champions in the formation is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)% for each Healing Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
当任意勇士的生命值降至其最大生命值的 $health_percent% 或更低时，在当前区域的剩余时间内巴尔德里克会一直点亮他的提灯，阵型中每有一名治疗型勇士，阵型中的勇士受到的所有治疗量增加 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
Baldric increases the pre-stack bonus of Bargaining Power by an additional $(not_buffed amount)%, but the effect of Healing Word is reduced by $(amount___2)%.
巴尔德里克使“交涉之力”叠加前的加成额外提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，但“治愈真言”的效果降低 $(amount___2)%。

specializationDescription.original: Baldric takes a calculated risk to bargain for power with a mysterious Dark Entity.
specializationDescription.display: 巴尔德里克冒着计算过的风险，与一个神秘的黑暗之神达成交易以换取力量。

description.desc: You may use any Dwarf Champion in the current adventure, even if the Patron, Variant, or other restrictions would say otherwise. Additionally, Dwarf Champions also count as Baldric's bargaining partners.
即使赞助者、支线任务或其他限制条件不允许，你仍可以在当前的冒险中使用一切矮人勇士。此外，矮人勇士也算作巴尔德里克的交涉伙伴。

description.desc: The damage of Dwarf Champions is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Dwarf in the formation, stacking multiplicatively, but you may only have one of each non-Dwarf species in the formation.
阵型中每有一个矮人，矮人勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，但阵型中每个非矮人种族只能有一名勇士。

description.desc: Bosses have a $amount% chance to drop twice as many gems, but non boss area quest requirements are increased by 100%.
首领有 $amount% 的几率掉落两倍的宝石，但非首领区域的任务要求提高 100%。

description.desc: All Champions with magic base attacks deal an additional 5 seconds of BUD-based damage with each attack, but all Champions without a magic base attack no longer deal any damage with their base attacks.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: $(target)'s base attack deals an additional $seconds_of_bud seconds of BUD-based damage with each attack

description.desc: 所有以魔法为基本攻击的勇士每次攻击额外造成等同于 5 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害，但所有不以魔法为基本攻击的勇士攻击不再造成任何伤害。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: $(target)的基本攻击会额外造成等同于 $seconds_of_bud 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害。

specializationDescription.display: 巴尔德里克冒着计算过的风险，与一个神秘的黑暗之神达成交易以换取力量。

specializationDescription.display: 巴尔德里克与法律与正义之神提尔有着复杂的关系。

description.desc: You may use any Dwarf Champion in the current adventure, even if the Patron, Variant, or other restrictions would say otherwise. Additionally, Dwarf Champions also count as Baldric's bargaining partners.
即使赞助者、支线任务或其他限制条件不允许，你仍可以在当前的冒险中使用一切矮人勇士。此外，矮人勇士也算作巴尔德里克的交涉伙伴。

specializationDescription.original: All dwarves are familiar with the strength of Moradin, the main deity of their pantheon.
specializationDescription.display: 所有矮人都熟知他们万神殿的主神摩拉丁的力量。

description.desc: Baldric gains the Gold Find role and increases the party's gold find by 100% for each bargaining partner, stacking multiplicatively. Additionally, Champions with the Gold Find role also count as Baldric's bargaining partners.
巴尔德里克获得金币寻获角色定位，并且阵型中每有一位交涉伙伴，他会使探险队的金币寻获量提高 100%，以乘算方式堆叠。此外，拥有金币寻获角色定位的勇士也算作巴尔德里克的交涉伙伴。

specializationDescription.original: Baldric bargains with Lady Luck herself when fortune and wealth are required.
specializationDescription.display: 当巴尔德里克需要运气和财富时，他会与幸运女神交涉。

description.desc: Baldric's base attack also deals 5 seconds of BUD-based damage and counts as a magic attack. Additionally, Champions with a magic base attack also count as Baldric's bargaining partners.
巴尔德里克的基本攻击也会造成等同于 5 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害，并算作魔法攻击。此外，以魔法为基本攻击的勇士也算作巴尔德里克的交涉伙伴。

specializationDescription.original: Baldric pleads with the Lady of Mysteries when in need of magic and knowledge.
specializationDescription.display: 当巴尔德里克需要魔法和知识时，他会去乞求神秘女神。

description.desc: Champions are immune to damage for $duration seconds after the first instance of damage that they would take in every area (including that damage), but take $(amount___3)% additional damage from all sources after that.
在每个区域中，勇士在第一次将受到伤害时会免疫伤害（包括该次伤害），持续 $duration 秒，但此后所有来源对他们造成的伤害会额外增加 $(amount___3)%。

specializationDescription.original: Baldric takes a calculated risk to bargain for power with a mysterious Dark Entity.
specializationDescription.display: 巴尔德里克冒着计算过的风险，与一个神秘的黑暗之神达成交易以换取力量。

description.original: I'm willing to give this a chance and see how it goes.
description.display: 我愿意试一试，看看会发生什么。

description.original: Go. I know you can do this. We'll face our demons together.
description.display: 上吧。我知道你一定能做到。我们一同面对心魔。

description.original: I'm an expert on owing debts that are difficult to pay.
description.display: 我对欠下那种难以偿还的债务可谓专家。

description.original: Whatever you do or say, be prepared to back up your words with actions.
description.display: 无论你说什么、做什么，都要准备好用行动兑现承诺。

description.original: I'm never intentionally working with that creature.
description.display: 我绝不会主动和那种生物合作。

description.original: I'm waiting for it to murder you in your sleep one night and eat your body.
description.display: 我在等着有一天它半夜把你杀了，再把你的尸体吃掉。

description.original: Share some of the fun, will you, Anson?
description.display: 安森，给大家也分点乐子吧？

description.original: Cazrin, you promised you wouldn't tell anyone I was feeding Uggie bacon!
description.display: 卡兹琳，你答应过不告诉别人我给乌吉喂培根的！

effects.description: Lowers the max damage per hit of Baldric's Shield of Filth ability to 20% of target's max health.

description.original: I'm a simple holy man on a quest for the finest red blend in Waterdeep.
description.display: 我只是个踏上旅程、寻找深水城最棒红酒的平凡圣职者。

description.original: Stop drooling on my clothes! It's going to take all day to get the stench out!
description.display: 别在我衣服上流口水了这臭味得一整天才能散掉

effects.description: Lowers the max damage per hit of Baldric's Shield of Filth ability to 10% of target's max health.

description.original: No one wants to take out the trash, but if someone doesn't do it...
description.display: 没人愿意倒垃圾，但总得有人来干这事……

description.original: That all you've got? Come try to impress me when you get a little older.
description.display: 你就这点本事？等你再长大点，再来试着让我刮目相看吧。

effects.description: Grants Baldric immunity to stun effects

description.original: Looks like there's still life in you yet.
description.display: 看来你的身体里还有生命力。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Baldric left his position as a prominent member of his family's mercantile empire to seek his fortunes elsewhere. He's a unique cleric that often confounds other clerics because he refuses to pledge his service or faith to a single deity. He prefers to bargain with any and all of them, depending on the situation, to receive his magic. This has lent him a confidence/cockiness that has landed him in his share of trouble. But now he's with the Fallbacks, and over the course of their adventures, his faith in them has become unshakable.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Baldric is a Support and Healing Champion who helps his affiliation members and those with a high Charisma. He heals Champions in the columns in front of him, and his specialization choices grant him diverse abilities from assorted deities.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 巴尔德里克舍弃了他在家族商业帝国中显赫的地位，踏上了另寻机遇的旅途。他是一位独特的牧师，常常令其他牧师感到困惑，因为他拒绝效忠或信仰任何单一的神。他更喜欢根据具体的情况与各路神明交涉以获得神力。这给了他信心或者说是傲气，虽然这也让他惹上过不少麻烦。但现在他成为了“后备队”的一员，在经历过各种冒险之后，他坚定不移地相信他的这群伙伴。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 巴尔德里克是一名支援和治疗型勇士，他会帮助他的从属组织成员和有着高魅力值的勇士。他会治疗处于他身前各列的勇士，并且他的专精选项让他能从各种不同的神那里获得不同的技能。

original.name: Two-Handed Mace
original.description: Baldric attacks the closest enemy, dealing 1 hit.

display.name: 双手大锤
display.description: 巴尔德里克攻击最近的敌人，造成 1 次打击。

original.name: Faith Aflame
original.description: Baldric prevents Champions from being stunned and he empowers his attacks for a short duration.
original.long_description: Baldric's mace ignites with radiant light, preventing Champions from being stunned and empowering his attacks for the duration it is aflame

display.name: 烈焰信仰
display.description: 巴尔德里克在短时间内使勇士们不会被眩晕，并强化他的攻击。
display.long_description: 巴尔德里克的大锤被耀眼的光芒点燃，在燃烧期间使勇士们不会被眩晕，并强化他的攻击。

original.name: Bargaining Power
original.tip_text: Baldric increases the damage of his bargaining partners, which start as Fallbacks Champions and those with a high Charisma. More can be added with his specialization choices!

display.name: 交涉之力
display.tip_text: 巴尔德里克会提高他交涉伙伴的伤害，他的交涉伙伴包括初始为“后备队”成员的勇士和有着高魅力值的勇士。你可通过他的专精选项来让更多的勇士加入其中！

original.name: Healing Word
original.tip_text: Baldric heals Champions in all the columns in front of him, and his Healing Lantern empowers all healing abilities when any Champions are heavily damaged.

display.name: 治愈真言
display.tip_text: 巴尔德里克会治疗处于他身前各列的勇士，并且当有任何勇士受重伤时，他的“治疗提灯”会强化所有治疗技能。

original.name: Bargain With Tyr
original.specialization_description: Baldric has a complicated relationship with Tyr, the god of law and justice.

display.name: 与提尔交涉
display.specialization_description: 巴尔德里克与法律与正义之神提尔有着复杂的关系。

original.name: Bargain With Moradin
original.specialization_description: All dwarves are familiar with the strength of Moradin, the main deity of their pantheon.

display.name: 与摩拉丁交涉
display.specialization_description: 所有矮人都熟知他们万神殿的主神摩拉丁的力量。

original.name: Bargain With Tymora
original.specialization_description: Baldric bargains with Lady Luck herself when fortune and wealth are required.

display.name: 与泰摩拉交涉
display.specialization_description: 当巴尔德里克需要运气和财富时，他会与幸运女神交涉。

original.name: Bargain With Mystra
original.specialization_description: Baldric pleads with the Lady of Mysteries when in need of magic and knowledge.

display.name: 与密斯特拉交涉
display.specialization_description: 当巴尔德里克需要魔法和知识时，他会去乞求神秘女神。

original.name: Bargain With Eldath
original.specialization_description: When violence is not the answer, Baldric turns to Eldath, the Guardian of Groves.

display.name: 与艾达丝交涉
display.specialization_description: 当暴力无法解决问题时，巴尔德里克会去向树林守护神艾达丝求助。

original.specialization_description: Baldric takes a calculated risk to bargain for power with a mysterious Dark Entity.

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: I'm willing to give this a chance and see how it goes.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 我愿意试一试，看看会发生什么。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: Go. I know you can do this. We'll face our demons together.

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 上吧。我知道你一定能做到。我们一同面对心魔。

original.name: Low Stakes
original.description: I'm an expert on owing debts that are difficult to pay.

display.name: 低风险低赌注
display.description: 我对欠下那种难以偿还的债务可谓专家。

original.name: Raise the Stakes
original.description: Whatever you do or say, be prepared to back up your words with actions.

display.name: 高风险高赌注
display.description: 无论你说什么、做什么，都要准备好用行动兑现承诺。

original.name: Baldric Person
original.description: I'm never intentionally working with that creature.

display.name: 巴尔德里克人类
display.description: 我绝不会主动和那种生物合作。

original.name: Baldric Friend
original.description: I'm waiting for it to murder you in your sleep one night and eat your body.

display.name: 巴尔德里克好友
display.description: 我在等着有一天它半夜把你杀了，再把你的尸体吃掉。

original.name: High Praise
original.description: Share some of the fun, will you, Anson?

display.name: 高度赞扬
display.description: 安森，给大家也分点乐子吧？

original.name: Trash Taste
original.description: Cazrin, you promised you wouldn't tell anyone I was feeding Uggie bacon!

effects.description: Lowers the max damage per hit of Baldric's Shield of Filth ability to 20% of target's max health.

display.name: 垃圾的味道
display.description: 卡兹琳，你答应过不告诉别人我给乌吉喂培根的！

effects.description: 使巴尔德里克“污秽之盾”技能每次命中的最大伤害降低为目标最大生命值的 20%。

original.name: Onerous Odor
original.description: Stop drooling on my clothes! It's going to take all day to get the stench out!

effects.description: Lowers the max damage per hit of Baldric's Shield of Filth ability to 10% of target's max health.

display.name: 难闻的气味
display.description: 别在我衣服上流口水了这臭味得一整天才能散掉

effects.description: 使巴尔德里克“污秽之盾”技能每次命中的最大伤害降低为目标最大生命值的 10%。

original.name: Lighthearted
original.description: I'm a simple holy man on a quest for the finest red blend in Waterdeep.

display.name: 轻松愉快
display.description: 我只是个踏上旅程、寻找深水城最棒红酒的平凡圣职者。

original.name: Tenacious
original.description: No one wants to take out the trash, but if someone doesn't do it...

display.name: 坚持不懈
display.description: 没人愿意倒垃圾，但总得有人来干这事……

original.name: Resolute
original.description: That all you've got? Come try to impress me when you get a little older.

effects.description: Grants Baldric immunity to stun effects

display.name: 坚定
display.description: 你就这点本事？等你再长大点，再来试着让我刮目相看吧。

effects.description: 赋予巴尔德里克免疫眩晕效果的能力。

original.name: Lightbringer
original.description: Looks like there's still life in you yet.

display.name: 光明使者
display.description: 看来你的身体里还有生命力。
